ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, social media) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  "sentiment_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment category */,
  "additional_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_sentiment_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_category_id") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_frequencies" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "positive_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in positive reviews */,
  "negative_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in negative reviews */,
  "neutral_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the word in neutral reviews */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the word */,
  "total_frequency" INTEGER /* Total frequency of the word across all reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_word_map" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Count of the word in the review */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the review */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive reviews */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Count of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* Count of neutral reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews on the specified date */,
  "average_sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
